name: Vagner Rego
background: Vagner Rego became President and CEO of Atlas Copco Group on May 1, 2024. He joined the Group in 1996 as a trainee in Brazil. He has held various leadership roles including President of the Compressor Technique business area and President of the Service division within Compressor Technique.

company_affiliations.name: Atlas Copco AB
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various roles including Vice President, Marketing Parts and Services and President, Compressor Technique Service Division
